storyInfo: Hoshiguma rescues Moriuchi, whom Mifune was trying to coerce into helping him, but Mifune seems satisfied at the outcome and leaves after instructing Mio to delay Hoshiguma. Tetsuya finds evidence of the 'Northern Court spy' that he was seeking, but there seems to be more to the story than meets the eye.

attributes.content: Are you really going to Kajimachi, Mifune-san?
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: This is between me, Tessai, and Hoshiguma. I have to put an end to it personally.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: If things go according to your plan, Tessai will yield, even without Hannya.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Does the idea of Hoshiguma coming back upset you so?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I don't see the need for it.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: True, you would have much more work to do if she came back. I'll tell you this plainly, since you'll someday take over for me.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: What do you think is the most important to living well in Mitsukue?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Unity?
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: No... the most important thing is beauty.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: A fine appearance will turn the people's prejudices on their head. You and I, we all benefit from it.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: If I kept looking like a thug, they would've kicked me off camera the first time I was on TV. I never could have built Kinseki Channel into what it is today.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: It's important that we conduct our business with the proper look, with beauty.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: There is an Ursine author—his name escapes me—he says that if a gun appears in the first act of a story...
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Then a Lateran must hold it by the third act, at the latest.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I believe there is a Columbian group by the name of Blacksteel that uses guns as well, Mifune-san.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Well, you know what I mean.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Mitsukue is too big, and it has grown too quickly. A lot of times, it's hard for us to tell if we're doing the right thing...
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: And so, we must make sure that everything we do has a proper beginning and end, that everyone is in their proper place, and the trigger of every gun is pulled by the end. This is the proper appearance. This is beauty.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: If I get your meaning... you want to see everything through to the bitter end.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Think of it however you want. Feel free to put my words to the test, once you become the Fourth Chairman of the Kinsekikai.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Right now, though, you should prepare to deal with Hoshiguma.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: She is a tough one.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: But she is an Oni, and one who has already gone berserk once.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Have you heard of an individual by the name of Qui'lon?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: All I know is that he lived a very long time ago, and had something to do with the Oni and the temples.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Setting aside those old warrior stories, it's this legend that Tessai talked about the most.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I don't know if they are true, and they're often contradictory. For example, Tessai has told at least three different versions of how Qui'lon died.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: But my favorite version is cruel... and beautiful.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Before he reached nirvana and entered Kaśjñāna, Qui'lon heard the cries of the last Oni when they were forced to become people of Ashihara.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: By then, however, Qui'lon no longer had the strength to leave Ashoka, nor wield a sword to save his people, or even keep his fiery blue wrath in check—
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: The flames of rage took over Qui'lon's soul. He lost all reason, and in his mad rampage destroyed an entire army even as he lay at the gates of death, but the kin whom he was trying to protect were also destroyed by his sword.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: It is unknown whether Qui'lon died of exhaustion, or took his own life, or whether he was so heartless that he attained nirvana, fully at peace with himself, in spite of what he did.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I'm not sure why you're telling me the legend of Qui'lon right now.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: An Oni is at its frailest when it realizes its own powerlessness. As to whether what follows next is depression or madness...
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Our foe has already demonstrated the answer, once.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Now, get some rest. I have a guest to greet.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Mifune-san... I bid you good health.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: You're not hurt, are you?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: No, no! I haven't slept better in a long while!
attributes.name: Moriuchi
Mifune
attributes.content: Yes, in your line of work, it's important to be of good humor, to smile...

attributes.name: Mifune
attributes.content: To be inquisitive.
attributes.joined: Yes, in your line of work, it's important to be of good humor, to smile... To be inquisitive.

attributes.content: Call Hoshiguma. Tell her that... I have something to discuss.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: See, Mifune-san... Hoshiguma helped me a lot, you know...
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Helped you discover the truth of the Wanyuudou?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Yes—
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: But not only that, right?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: What was going through your mind when you stood in front of your yatai, at a loss? Thinking about all those years you wasted chasing the kaidan, weren't you?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Now you know it was all fabricated. You were fooled by me and these kaidan stories I made up.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Why... Why did you do it?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: None of your business. Just think of it as a stroke of bad luck. But life goes on, after all. So, if you're willing, there's something more concrete you can seize.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Are you trying to bribe me?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Bribe? No. Make the call, and you can keep up your little information broker gig going. Refuse, and you know what the Kinsekikai does to our enemies.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Mifune-san—
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Would you like a reminder of how you lost your right eye?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I haven't forgotten. I barged in on one of your negotiations while chasing a kaidan...
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: I took one eye because you saw what you shouldn't have seen. I let you keep the other because I valued your talent, and as a warning to you.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Now, it's time you showed some gratitude.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Please, give me a few minutes to think—
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Mifune slowly draws his blade.
Moriuchi's gaze is fixed upon the blade's tip, as it slowly moves to his own throat.
He gulps, unsure whether to open his mouth or close it—
What's that sound?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: The office door is kicked open before Moriuchi can even react.
H-Hoshiguma?!
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Go!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: But you...
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: He can't keep me. And I have questions for him.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Moriuchi takes one long look at Hoshiguma and hastily leaves.
You don't seem anxious that I took someone from right under your nose.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Why should I be anxious, when something that I thought would take so much effort suddenly sorted itself out on its own?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Why did you forge that letter to bring me back?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: It's complicated. I just told the story to somebody else, and I'm not in the mood to tell it again.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: But the Old Man must know the simplest reason, however slow he might be... Hannya.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Hannya?!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: You didn't even think of that? Some yakuza! No wonder he made an enemy out of his own son, him and his beloved Ao-Oni of Kinsekikai!
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Mio!
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I'm afraid your break's over. Stall her.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Alright.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: You think your boys can beat Uncle Tessai if you stall me? Keep dreaming.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Why do you think victory is just a question of combat?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: What are you planning, then?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: You'll see.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Now, I'd better be going.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Hold it right there—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: You'll be the one holding it, actually.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Fire, and humming.
The scattered screens continue to stand, unmoving.
They've escorted Mifune-san away. I will be your opponent.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Your blade. Draw it.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: No need for the blade if it's you.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Is that so?
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: With the unpleasant sound of metal against metal, a black ethereal hand appears from behind Mio, leisurely wrapping itself around a white tantou.
Three hands, three blades.
You're strong, but that doesn't mean you have what it takes to get away from me, much less without drawing your blade.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: You think the sword's my only weapon?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Before she finishes her sentence, Hoshiguma raises her right leg high and brings it down on the round table beside her, with great force.
The table flies into the air, blocking her opponent's view.
With a powerful leap, Hoshiguma points her sheathed sword at her foe's head—
Three flashes greet her, cutting the table open like a hot knife through butter.
The sheath encounters the black hand, delivering great force—
Hyaaah!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: ...Impressive power.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Why don't you draw your blade?
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: None of your business.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: You're afraid.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Afraid? Me?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: You're afraid that drawing your blade will cause something that you don't want to happen.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Qui'lon's death... I see.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: What?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: But what you fear will happen, whether you draw your blade or not, it will be your inevitable end. Assuming Mifune-san's predictions are accurate.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: I don't really get it.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Despicable.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Me?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: No, not you.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Me.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Run. Flee.
Moriuchi does not know how long he has been running. He can feel his own innards shaking and trembling.

attributes.name: Moriuchi
attributes.content: Huff... huff... huff...

attributes.name: Moriuchi
attributes.content: *cough* *cough*
D-Did I shake them?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: You got out on your own?
Who's there?!
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Forgot me so soon?
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: K-Kami-sama?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Don't look at me like that. I'm not here to help you. I don't like the answer about the kaidan that I got at your yatai.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: I kind of hate it.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: I... I get that.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: I had planned on cutting ties with you and the kaidan entirely, perhaps even leave Mitsukue and take a trip to the north.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: But someone asked me to do something.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: The kannushi? He asked you to find me?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Not him.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: Who else could it be, then?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: You don't mean—
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: It asked me to bring you a single message.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: 'Meet me on your usual rooftop.'
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: C-Could it be...?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: I've delivered the message. It's time to go.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: The kami turns around on its unicycle. No sooner has it got on than it sees Moriuchi is already a long way off.
...Is this how you repay him, when he's searched for you for so many years?
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: You know what, it's none of my business.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: Moriuchi runs up the steps.
He is running as hard as he can.
A breeze blows in Moriuchi's face as he opens the door.
Many a sunset has he watched lying on this rooftop, watching the sky turn from red to black, until the stars appear, before their light is overcome by the neon city.
The hour is early, and the sky should not look like dusk, but he pays little heed. Perhaps he considers it a sign of the coming of a kami.
He could not describe his own emotions as he gazes at the sky.
Excitement? Anxiety? Fulfillment? Emptiness? Sadness?
But he lies there, waiting for a guest who may never come...
Until the warm breeze sends him into slumber.
Father... I think there's something behind the Kamidana.
attributes.name: Young Moriuchi

attributes.content: Behave yourself, Tooru! This is a sacred shrine!
attributes.name: Father

attributes.content: But it's really there...
attributes.name: Young Moriuchi

attributes.content: Come, Tooru, it's our turn to pray.
attributes.name: Mother

attributes.content: Please, Kami-sama, keep our family safe, and may we repay our debts soon...
attributes.name: Mother

attributes.content: There... the debt should be settled, with some money left over even...
attributes.name: Father

attributes.content: We're out of the woods!
attributes.name: Father

attributes.content: Wh-What are you doing here? Are you bored of the shrine?
attributes.name: Young Moriuchi

attributes.content: Kami-sama, arigatou!
attributes.name: Young Moriuchi

attributes.content: Father's mood has gotten a lot better, and mother has had time to take me out.
attributes.name: Young Moriuchi

attributes.content: Can I come and see you again?
attributes.name: Young Moriuchi

attributes.content: —No, I'll definitely come and see you again!
attributes.name: Young Moriuchi

attributes.content: Our shop just opened! It's really pretty. Do you want to come and see it?
attributes.name: Young Moriuchi

attributes.content: I'm sorry, Kami-sama, I've been busy helping out at home and haven't had time to come see you... please, don't be angry and let me see you?
attributes.name: Young Moriuchi

attributes.content: K-Kami-sama? Are you still there? Did you leave? Or... do you not want to see me anymore?
attributes.name: Adolescent Moriuchi

attributes.content: I-I'll treat it like you don't want to see me, but you're still listening to me, okay?
attributes.name: Adolescent Moriuchi

attributes.content: Some things have happened at home. Father may have to go back to manual labor.
attributes.name: Adolescent Moriuchi

attributes.content: Mother's been sewing clothes for other people. Her eyesight's declining.
attributes.name: Adolescent Moriuchi

attributes.content: But I'm sure none of that has anything to do with you. You gave so many blessings to our family. Surely you wouldn't take it all back...
attributes.name: Adolescent Moriuchi

attributes.content: Surely...
attributes.name: Adolescent Moriuchi

attributes.content: Kami-sama, Father...
attributes.name: Adult Moriuchi

attributes.content: Father is dead. Overdrinking. The blow was too great for him.
attributes.name: Adult Moriuchi

attributes.content: ...Where are you?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Please, Kami-sama... where are you?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: This haunted house...
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: It's empty... something's not right!
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: It's connected to the nomadic city's superstructure?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: H-How am I suppose to search this place? This is far more than just one house or Kajimachi. The whole plate might be connected...
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: No, don't get discouraged. As long as I find that bastard—
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Wh-What's this?!
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Tetsuya stands dumbfounded, staring at dozens of crates that someone has stacked up here.
He blinks a few times and opens one of them.
It's... weapons?!
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Katana, crossbows... grenade launchers...
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Is that... the Hoashi emblem? That major Northern Court clan? Is this where they hid their weapons?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: He takes down a weapon-filled crate and opens the one underneath it, finding Northern Court standard-issue provisions and medical supplies inside.
He furiously takes the crates down one by one, opening all of them.
All contain military supplies manufactured by the Northern Court, every single one.
Th-The Northern Court weapons that Papa says aren't here? But they are—
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: You've gone too far, boy.
attributes.name: Hidden Ninja

attributes.content: Who are you?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Oyabun wanted you to look for traces of Northern Court spies. It's enough that you found them. You've made a lot of work opening these up, one-by-one.
attributes.name: Hidden Ninja

attributes.content: ...Did you just take my picture?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: This is big, after all. Best keep some evidence, to prevent disputes.
attributes.name: Hidden Ninja

attributes.content: Let's go.
attributes.name: Hidden Ninja

attributes.content: Where to?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: To see Mifune-san.
attributes.name: Hidden Ninja

attributes.content: W-Wait, you were stalking me?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: That's not important. What's important is that you're working for Mifune-san, and so am I.
attributes.name: Hidden Ninja

attributes.content: And take that mask off.
attributes.name: Hidden Ninja

attributes.content: Huh?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: You're meeting the oyabun. It's a little disrespectful to have your mask on, isn't it?
attributes.name: Hidden Ninja

attributes.content: For some reason, Tetsuya feels a chill run up his spine, perhaps from the cold wind blowing in from the tunnels, but he has no choice but to comply.
